component.name: UNetbootin
component.summary: Create bootable USB drives from ISO files

description.p: UNetbootin is a cross-platform tool for creating bootable USB drives from ISO files.
It allows you to create bootable Live USB drives for a variety of Linux distributions, as well as other operating systems and utilities.

ul.li: Download ISO files from various distributions automatically
Create bootable USB drives from existing ISO files
Persistent storage support for Live USB drives
